name: ECTOPIC PANCREAS
definition: PANCREATIC REST / CHORISTOMA = HETEROTOPIC PANCREAS = MYOEPITHELIAL HAMARTOMA presence of abnormally located pancreatic tissue with its own ductal system and NO vascular

demographics.Size: usually 0.5-2.0 (up to 5.0 cm in its largest diameter)

dominant_finding: 5-20 mm small cystic change in markedly thickened wall of 2nd part of duodenum ←
discriminating_features: PATHOGNOMONIC presence of ducts on MRCP
smooth cone- / nipple-shaped submucosal nodule 1-5 cm (rarely > 3-4 cm) in size
central umbilication representing orifice of filiform duct
flat / ovoid irregularly marginated intramural mass
homogeneously enhancing with intraluminal extension (= enhancement pattern similar to

clinical.Cx: biliary + intestinal obstruction, massive GI bleeding, pancreatitis, paraduodenal
